name: Background Remover
description: Automatically and accurately remove the background from any image using advanced computer vision. Perfect for e-commerce product photos, profile pictures, and graphic design tools.
shortDesc: Remove backgrounds from images instantly with AI

params.name: image_url
params.desc: URL of the image to process (or use base64 in 'image_base64' param)

howItWorks: Provide an image URL or base64 encoded string
Our Vision AI detects the main subject(s) in the foreground
A precise mask is generated around the subject
The background is removed (replaced with transparency)
A temporary URL containing the result is returned
